response.justification: Bogdan brings a wealth of Staff-level experience, crucially including direct work on AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators, which perfectly aligns with the role's AI-driven mindset. He also possesses deep expertise in high-throughput distributed systems and strong TypeScript skills. Although he lacks the specified Python requirement, his polyglot background and exact match on agentic workflows strongly warrant an interview.
strengths: Directly relevant experience building AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators.
Proven capability in high-throughput distributed environments, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Extensive Staff-level background with a strong focus on software craftsmanship, TDD, and polyglot development.
concerns: Lacks the 'Strong Python' requirement, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
No explicit mention of out-of-hours on-call rotation or incident response experience.
The timeline in the resume is highly irregular and overlapping (e.g., current job since 2011, previous job 2007-2011, founder since 2002), which will require clarification.
